text.title: Product Operations (PM-side) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying product operations (pm-side) end-to-end.

step.name: draft-raci
step.action: Use sonnet to author RACI per artefact.
step.decision-gate: If any artefact has overlapping accountability, escalate to Head of Product.

step.name: map-canonical-stores
step.action: Map each artefact to its canonical owner + link.

step.name: handoff-scaled-ceremonies
step.action: Identify ceremonies adopted by >=3 PMs; hand off to Product Ops.

step.name: publish-and-quarterly-review
step.action: Publish contract; review quarterly for org changes.
step.decision-gate: If org chart changes, schedule contract refresh.
